name: songstyle-ai-design-system
description: A modern Song-inspired design system for AI-generated websites and Web UI.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE-CODE AND LICENSE-CONTENT

scripts.build: npm run tokens:build && astro check && astro build
scripts.tokens:check: node --test tests/design-tokens.test.mjs && npm run tokens:build && git diff --exit-code -- design-tokens/dist
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm run links:check && npm run test:e2e
